overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The camera follows a pedestrian through vibrant streets lined with holographic advertisements, elevated highways, and bustling urban infrastructure, transitioning from red-lit commercial zones to green-lit underpasses before reaching a major intersection dominated by a massive digital billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with food vendors

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a cyan outfit along the sidewalk, passing food stalls and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in cyan clothing walking ahead of the player character

entered.detail: red neon-lit food stall with 'BURRITO' signage
multi-level highway structure with red neon underlighting spanning the street
tall building covered in holographic advertisements and digital screens
futuristic cars parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vibrant cyberpunk street at night, with the camera following a pedestrian past a red-lit burrito stand. The elevated highway looms ahead with red neon accents, while holographic advertisements cover the buildings to the left. The sidewalk is relatively clear with only a few pedestrians visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with green neon lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from red/pink to green as the character walks under the overpass
passing under the highway structure into a more enclosed corridor with benches

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the pedestrian through the covered walkway beneath the highway

entered.detail: futuristic benches with integrated cyan lighting underneath
red signage with 'Carmel' text visible on the overpass structure
industrial containers and trash receptacles along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered section beneath the elevated highway where the lighting shifts dramatically to green neon. Glowing benches line the right side of the walkway. The space feels more enclosed with the highway structure overhead, and the 'Carmel' sign becomes visible in the distance as the walk continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and massive digital displays

events.description: exits covered walkway and enters open intersection with crosswalk markings
character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while following the pedestrian, approaching the large digital billboard

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying 'BELOW DECK' with changing facial imagery
yellow striped crosswalk markings on the asphalt
building covered in green-tinted glass and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the character crosses the street. The massive 'Below Deck' digital billboard dominates the view ahead, displaying animated faces on a towering vertical screen. The crosswalk stripes guide the path forward while futuristic vehicles pass by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: times square style plaza with towering digital advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the massive billboard, then returns to street level
multiple vehicles pass through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the towering digital billboard before continuing across the intersection

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: traffic moving through the intersection including white and yellow cars
tall buildings covered in multiple layers of holographic ads and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to emphasize the scale of the 'Below Deck' billboard towering overhead, surrounded by dense clusters of digital advertisements on surrounding buildings. The intersection is active with moderate traffic flowing through, and the camera character appears to pause momentarily to observe the massive display before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk district that transitions from a red-hued commercial street into a green-lit underpass before opening into a massive digital plaza. It begins by following a pedestrian past a red-lit burrito stand and holographic advertisements, moving toward the looming structure of an elevated highway. As the character passes beneath the highway, the environment shifts dramatically to an enclosed walkway bathed in green neon light and lined with glowing benches. The scene then expands into a wide intersection where the camera crosses the street past futuristic vehicles, guided by white crosswalk stripes toward a towering digital billboard. Finally, the camera tilts upward to emphasize the immense scale of the Below Deck display and the surrounding clusters of advertisements that dominate the urban skyline.
